name: Reflex Sterilized Cat Food Salmon And Rice 15kg
shortDescription: Reflex Sterilised Catfish, an especially formulated complete and balanced premium cat food including chicken and fish protein to meet nutritional requirements of adult sterilized cat breeds. Same great quality but now in our new and improved packaging with zip seal technology.
description: Reflex Adult Cat SteriliSed – Salmon & Rice is a specially formulated complete and balanced premium adult cat food made with Salmon and Rice. It contains extra fiber and lower carbohydrates to combat the easy weight gain in sterilized cats. INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Fish Meal, Corn Gluten, Fish Fat, Dried Sugar Beet, Fish Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer’s Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, lodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 – B2 – B3 (Niasin) – B6 – B12 – B7 (Biotin) -B9 (Folic Acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantothenate. NUTRIENT COMPOSITION NUTRITIVE ADDITIONS Crude Protein 33% Vitamin A (E672) 19800 IU/kg Crude Fat 12% Vitamin D3(E671) ?1650 IU/kg Crude Ash 2% Vitamin E (3A700) 220 mg/kg Crude Cellulose (Fiber ) 5% Vitamin C (Stay C) 220 mg/kg Taurine 1650 mg/kg DAILY FEEDING GUIDE: CAT WEIGHT 1 – 2 kg 2 – 3 kg 3 – 4 kg 4 – 5 kg 5 – 6 kg 6 – 7 kg 7 – 8 kg GR / DAY 25 – 35 35 – 55 55 – 75 75 – 90 90 – 110 110 – 130 130 – 145   FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: Daily ration can vary linked to ambient temperature, cat’s lifestyle (indoor-outdoor), temperament and activity. In order to ensure ideal body weight of your cat, weigh out the quantity of food. To provide the correct portions, assess your cat’s appetite, visual appearance and stools. Switch over from one food to another should be done gradually by mixing small amounts of both foods during a period of one week. Ensure that your cat has permanent access to fresh water. Even if the water seems clear, change it at least daily. Keep the product in a dry and cool place and be sure the food bag is properly closed after each feeding.
